hero.title: Empowering education with our printed resources and digital solutions.
hero.subtitle: In addition to the printed and digital solutions we offer to educational institutions in foreign languages, we produce smart board software and AI-powered learning management systems for companies in the education sector, while also managing the procurement processes of schools.

features.title: A sustainable solution partnership in education...
features.subtitle: We provide comprehensive educational solutions that cater to diverse learning needs and teaching methods.
features.curatedSelectionDesc: Carefully selected educational materials from both Turkish and international publishers to ensure the highest quality resources.
features.supportDesc: Expert guidance and support for educational institutions in selecting and implementing educational materials.
features.materialsDesc: A wide range of educational resources covering English, German, French, and Spanish learning levels and teaching methodologies.

about.title: Our Mission
about.subtitle: We are dedicated to enriching educational experiences by providing high-quality learning materials to schools and universities across Turkey.
about.intro: At Dream Education, we understand that quality education requires quality resources. That's why we've made it our mission to bridge the gap between international educational excellence and Turkish educational institutions.

feature1.title: Carefully Curated Materials
feature1.desc: We partner with leading publishers worldwide to bring the best educational resources to educational institutions.

feature2.title: Expert Support
feature2.desc: Our academic team provides guidance on material selection, effective implementation, and professional development training.

feature3.title: Institution-Specific Understanding
feature3.desc: With deep roots in the Turkish education system, we understand the unique needs of our schools and universities.

about.vision: Our vision is to contribute to a future where every student in Turkey has access to world-class educational materials, fostering a generation of global citizens prepared for tomorrow's challenges.

solutions.title: Our Solutions
solutions.subtitle: Dream Education offers printed resources, digital learning solutions, assessment systems, and teacher training under a single integrated structure to enhance academic success, teacher competency, and student motivation in educational institutions.

curriculum.title: Printed Resources
curriculum.description: Needs analyses are conducted based on the school's English class hours, academic background, goals, and teacher analyses. Then, appropriate printed resources prepared to international standards that form the academic backbone of the school are selected.

digital.title: Digital Learning Products
digital.description: Digital platforms that support printed content, align with targeted programs and resources, establish the school-home connection, and enrich the student's learning process by ensuring learning continues at home.

planning.title: Assessment & Evaluation
planning.description: Assessment tools that track student development with numerical data and support decision-making processes.

training.title: Teacher Training
training.description: The most critical building block ensuring the sustainability of the system: teacher development.

solutions.closing: As Dream Education, our goal is to strengthen the academic vision of educational institutions, ensure students acquire language skills at global standards, and support teachers with continuous development. To realize the vision of 'happy teachers = happy students' by putting the teacher at the center.
solutions.closingFinal: We don't just offer products; we build a sustainable solution partnership in education.

testimonials.title: Client Success Stories
testimonials.subtitle: See how our solutions have helped educational institutions achieve their goals.

1.body: The personalized support and attention to detail have made Dream Education an essential partner in our success.
1.author: Selin Yılmaz
1.title: Curriculum Coordinator

2.body: Their innovative solutions and dedicated support team have helped us achieve our educational goals effectively.
2.author: Emre Çelik
2.title: Deputy Principal
